card_name_verified: Costco Anywhere Visa® Business Card by Citi ($0 AF with paid Costco membership)
_review_reason: Pure cashback card — no recurring USD statement credits. Cashback paid as annual reward certificate (Feb statement, redeemable at Costco) which is earnings-based, not a credit. Earning rates: 5% Costco gas (up to $7k), 4% other gas/EV, 3% restaurants/travel, 2% Costco purchases, 1% other. Other features qualitative: no FX fees, fraud monitoring.
